productName: ThunderStix BLUNT-Tilted-DOH-glass tip preroll(1.2g) / Barf Breath
description: A hybrid blunt of Barf Breath taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
